title: ipad and iphone users cannot access files from file gallery
excerpt: i just learned that ipad and iphone users cannot open files that are stored in files gallery.  Really need this for client interface and designers working on tablets!

posts.author: racbat (Rachel)
posts.cookedHtml: i just learned that ipad and iphone users cannot open files that are stored in files gallery. Really need this for client interface and designers working on tablets!
